<!--
Thanks for contributing to Regula. Please keep the PR small and focused
(one thing at a time). The verify gate and claim-auditor run
automatically — see CONTRIBUTING.md for local reproduction steps.
-->

## What does this PR change?

<!-- One or two sentences on what the change is and why. If the answer
is longer than two sentences, consider splitting into multiple PRs. -->

## Category

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Risk pattern addition or correction
- [ ] Regulatory delta-log entry
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test / CI improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 tests/test_classification.py` — passes locally
- [ ] `python3 -m scripts.cli self-test` — passes
- [ ] `python3 -m scripts.cli doctor` — no new warnings
- [ ] `python3 -m scripts.cli security-self-check` — zero unexpected findings
- [ ] `python3 scripts/claim_auditor.py --staged` — zero unsourced claims

## Honesty gate (read `CLAUDE.md` → Honesty & Verification)

- [ ] Every numeric claim, benchmark, or competitive assertion in this PR
      is backed by a primary source cited inline (URL, test output, or
      file reference)
- [ ] No superlatives like "only", "first", "most advanced" unless
      verified against a primary source
- [ ] Regulatory claims cite the specific EU AI Act Article or Recital
- [ ] If adding a risk pattern, the `article` field is set and the
      description is developer-actionable (not marketing copy)

## Scope (if this change touches load-bearing code)

- [ ] Changes are surgical — no "while I'm here" refactors
- [ ] No `# noqa`, `# type: ignore`, or equivalent suppressions added
- [ ] Test files were not modified to make a failing test pass
- [ ] If the PR changes a count (commands / patterns / frameworks),
      the numeric claim in `data/site_facts.md` was regenerated by
      running `python3 scripts/site_facts.py`

## Locale parity (if this PR touches landing pages)

- [ ] `index.html`, `de.html`, `pt-br.html`, `uae.html` updated in the
      same commit (never ship a copy change that leaves locales out of
      sync)

<!-- Fixes #123 -->
